content: Reconstruct PROC-07. List the real step_ids, comma-separated.

content.content:
{"content": "Subject: deduction disputes
STEP-71 someone has to decode the retailer's reason code by hand - the mapping is
in nobody's system, it's tribal. STEP-72 the validity triage is a judgment and
the two systems disagree on what's owed. STEP-75 the dispute package is drafted
here in email and the argument only lives in the thread. STEP-76 whether we
dispute or eat it is a person's call. (STEP-79 is the co-op accrual, different
flow - ignore.)", "kind": "email_thread", "process_id": "PROC-07", "source_id": "SRC-701"}

{"kind": "spreadsheet", "process_id": "PROC-07", "rows": [["step_code", "note"], ["STEP-73", "backup docs (POD, signed BOLs) show up late or not at all"], ["STEP-74", "claim by weight, our records by case - recomputing pack math is manual"]], "source_id": "SRC-702"}

{"content": "Portal path:\nScreen 1 -> EDI inbox: STEP-70 the deduction (812) lands structured.\nScreen 8 -> STEP-77 post the recovery/accrual once the dispute resolves.", "kind": "portal_clickpath", "process_id": "PROC-07", "source_id": "SRC-703"}

{"content": "order of ops: STEP-70 -> STEP-71 -> STEP-72 -> STEP-73 -> STEP-74 -> STEP-75 ->\nSTEP-76 -> STEP-77. at STEP-72 if it's a valid deduction you branch to gather\nbackup; at STEP-76 if we win the dispute you branch to post recovery.", "kind": "tribal_note", "process_id": "PROC-07", "source_id": "SRC-704"}
